title: coap_keys.c: CBOR decoding assumes map header type without validation
close_reason: Refactored decode_key_put_cbor to use zcbor_decode (map_start, tstr_decode, any_skip, map_end) matching coap_config.c. Removes 152 lines of manual parser prone to header assumptions. Verified with west build. Fixes rkv7.
